# HP domain
```{R}
library(dplyr)
rm(list=ls())


domain <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/files/domain_results.csv")
domain <- domain[domain$Evalue != 0,]

table(domain$File)
length(unique(domain$File))
table(domain$Domain)
length(unique(domain$Domain))

ggplot(domain, aes(x=Domain, y=-log10(Evalue), color=File)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title="Domain E-value Distribution", x="Domain", y="-log10(E-value)") +
  scale_color_discrete(name="File") +
  geom_text(aes(label=ifelse(-log10(Evalue) > 3, as.character(File), '')),
            hjust=0, vjust=0, size=3, check_overlap = TRUE)
# ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Figures/F1_deg/domain_Evalue_distribution.pdf", width=16, height=6)

ggplot(domain, aes(x=File, y=-log10(Evalue), color=Domain)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title="HP E-value Distribution", x="HP", y="-log10(E-value)") +
  scale_color_discrete(name="File") +
  geom_text(aes(label=ifelse(-log10(Evalue) > 3, as.character(Domain), '')),
            hjust=0, vjust=0, size=3, check_overlap = TRUE)
# ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Figures/F1_deg/HP_Evalue_distribution.pdf", width=16, height=6)
```
## side by side
```{r}
HP <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/files/pass_faill_HP.csv")
PA_anno <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/BIOTOOLS/ref/PA_geneanno.csv", header = T)


# gene length
pass <- merge(HP, PA_anno, by.x = "pass", by.y = "ID")
pass$length <- pass$end - pass$start + 1
fail <- merge(HP, PA_anno, by.x = "fail", by.y = "ID")
fail$length <- fail$end - fail$start + 1

length <- rbind(data.frame(name = "pass", length = pass$end - pass$start + 1), data.frame(name = "fail", length = fail$end - fail$start + 1))
ggplot(length, aes(x=name, y=log10(length), fill=name)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title="Gene Length Distribution", x="Group", y="Gene Length") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("pass"="#C6AEBA", "fail"="#A9A9A9")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("fail", "pass")), method = "wilcox.test",label = "p.format")
# ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/gene_length_comparison.pdf", width=2.5, height=3)





# domain
domain_yes <- merge(HP, domain, by.x = "pass", by.y = "File")
domain_no <- merge(HP, domain, by.x = "fail", by.y = "File")

length(unique(domain_yes$pass))
length(unique(domain_no$fail))
length(unique(domain$File))



# operon
tbl <- matrix(c(542,623,350,565), nrow=2, byrow=TRUE,
dimnames=list(c("in","not_in"), c("single","operon")))
tbl
chisq.test(tbl, correct=FALSE) # Pearson χ²
fisher.test(tbl) # Fisher 精确检验（可做为稳健性检查）
prop.test(c(542,350), c(542+623, 350+565)) # 比较single比例差异

```
